# sizeInBytes(ofTypes:)

**Instance Method**

Retrieves the size in bytes of the specific data types in this data record.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func sizeInBytes(ofTypes dataTypes: Set<WKWebExtension.DataType>) -> Int
```

## Parameters

- **dataTypes**: The set of data types to measure the size for.

## Related Documentation

- **totalSizeInBytes**: The total size in bytes of all data types contained in this data record.
